plugin_desc: EndRun time-server SNMP collection for devices under EndRun PEN 13827. This child template relies on the shared SNMP floor for MIB-II uptime and IF-MIB 64-bit HC interface traffic. Stable private CPU, memory, temperature, fan and power health scalars are not proven in the current MIB facts, so NTP, PTP and GPS service indicators are not promoted into shared device-health metrics.
name: NetworkService
